cards.name: Break the Silence
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: You may KO one of your cards with no rules text.
[hc:ranged]: Gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you may spend it to get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Declaration of War
abilities: [team:inhumans]: Gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you may spend it to reveal the top two cards of your deck. Put each of those cards with no rules text into your hand and put the rest back in any order.

cards.name: The King's Speech
abilities: Gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you may spend it to choose "Speak" or "Don't Speak" then reveal the top 3 cards of your deck:
[keyword:Speak]: Put all of them with rules text into your hand.
[keyword:Don't Speak]: You may KO any number of them with no rules text.
Put the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Queen of the Inhumans
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: Gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor].
Gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you may spend it to get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Splitting Hairs
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: Draw a card and gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor].
[hc:instinct]: Gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you may spend it to draw a card.

cards.name: Royal Command
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: Gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor].
[team:inhumans]: Gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you may spend it to KO one of your cards.

cards.name: Headstrong
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: Draw two cards and gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor].
Gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you may spend it to draw two cards.

cards.name: Earth, Air, Fire, and Water
abilities: [hc:strength][hc:instinct][hc:covert][hc:ranged]: You get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Master the Four Elements
abilities: Choose [hc:strength], [hc:instinct], [hc:covert], or [hc:ranged]. This card is only that Hero Class this turn.
Draw a card.

cards.name: Elemental Princess
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: You may KO one of your cards that isn't [hc:strength], [hc:instinct], [hc:covert], or [hc:ranged].
Gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you may spend it to make this card [hc:strength], [hc:instinct], [hc:covert], and [hc:ranged] this turn.

cards.name: Weave Four Into One
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: You may gain a [hc:strength], [hc:instinct], [hc:covert], or [hc:ranged] Hero from the HQ.
Reveal the top four cards of your deck. Put a [hc:strength] Hero, a [hc:instinct] Hero, a [hc:covert] Hero, and a [hc:ranged] Hero from among them into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Brilliant Strategist
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: You get +1[icon:attack].
[hc:covert]: When you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn, draw an extra card.

cards.name: Find Fatal Flaw
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: You get +2[icon:attack].
[rule:Choose a Villain Group]. You get +1[icon:recruit] for each Villain in your Victory Pile from that Group.

cards.name: Shatter the Weak Point
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: You get +3[icon:attack].
[rule:Choose a Villain Group]. You get +1[icon:attack] for each Villain in your Victory Pile from that Group.

cards.name: Seek the Center
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: You get +4[icon:attack].
Whenever you play a card this turn, including this one, you may first use that card's "When Recruited" ability.

cards.name: Lockjaw, Inhuman's Best Friend
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: You may [keyword:Teleport] a 0-cost Hero from your hand.
[hc:covert]: You may [keyword:Teleport] another card from your hand.

cards.name: Stomping Shockwave
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: [keyword:Abomination] (after refilling HQ)
[hc:strength]: [keyword:Streets Abomination]

cards.name: Trample Underhoof
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: You may KO one of your cards with no [icon:attack] icon.
[keyword:Highest Abomination]

cards.name: Lead the Inhuman Elite
abilities: [keyword:"When Recruited" Abilities]: [keyword:Abomination] (after refilling HQ)
[keyword:Teleport] [team:inhumans]: [keyword:Rooftops Abomination]
[team:inhumans]: [keyword:Abomination]

cards.name: Maximus the Mad
abilities: [keyword:Double Highest Abomination]
Always Leads: Inhuman Rebellion
Master Strike: Reveal one of Maximus' remaining Mastermind Tactics at random. Use its Fight effect, then shuffle it back into the remaining Tactics.

cards.name: Epic Maximus the Mad
abilities: [keyword:Double Highest Abomination]
Always Leads: Inhuman Rebellion
Master Strike: Reveal two different Tactics at random from Maximus' remaining Mastermind Tactics. Then use each of those Fight effects, then shuffle them back.

cards.name: Echo-Tech Chorus Sentries
abilities: Fight: Each player KOs one of their [hc:tech] or [team:inhumans] Heroes or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Sieve of Secrets
abilities: Fight: Each player reveals the top 6 cards of their deck, discards all the non-grey Heroes revealed, and puts the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Seize the Inhuman Throne
abilities: Fight: Each player discards down to 4 cards. Maximus gains the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If he already has it, he spends it and each player discards down to 3 cards.

cards.name: Terrigen Bomb
abilities: Fight: Put each Hero from the HQ that doesn't have a printed [icon:attack] of 2 or more on the bottom of the Hero Deck. Maximus gains the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If he already had it, he spends it and each player KOs one of their non-grey Heroes with an [icon:attack] icon.

cards.name: Emperor Vulcan of the Shi'ar
abilities: Vulcan gets +3[icon:attack] while he has the [keyword:Thrones Favor].
Always Leads: Shi'ar Imperial Elite
Master Strike: Each player that doesn't have the [keyword:Thrones Favor] gains a Wound. Then Vulcan gains the [keyword:Thrones Favor].

cards.name: Epic Emperor Vulcan
abilities: Vulcan gets +5[icon:attack] while he has the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. He starts with the [keyword:Thrones Favor].
Always Leads: Shi'ar Imperial Elite
Master Strike: Each player that doesn't have the [keyword:Thrones Favor] gains a Wound to the top of their deck. Then Vulcan gains the [keyword:Thrones Favor].

cards.name: Blast Every Form of Energy
abilities: Fight: If you have the [keyword:Thrones Favor], you may KO a card you played this turn, and you may KO a card from your discard pile.
Then Vulcan gains the [keyword:Thrones Favor].

cards.name: Vast Wealth of the Shi'ar
abilities: Fight: If you have the [keyword:Thrones Favor], you get +4[icon:recruit].
Then Vulcan gains the [keyword:Thrones Favor].

cards.name: Contempt for Weakness
abilities: Fight: If Vulcan has the [keyword:Thrones Favor], each other player discards each of their cards that costs 2 or less.
Then you gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor].

cards.name: Solar Cage
abilities: Fight: If Vulcan has the [keyword:Thrones Favor], each other player shuffles a Wound from the Wound Stack and a non-grey Hero from their hand into their deck.
Then you gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor].

cards.name: Lineage
abilities: [keyword:Abomination]
Fight: Rescue Bystanders equal to the printed [icon:attack] of the Hero in the HQ space under Lineage.

cards.name: Omega
abilities: [keyword:Abomination]
Fight: Choose "Alpha" or "Omega." Then reveal the top card of your deck:
[keyword:Alpha]: If that card costs 0, KO it. [keyword:Omega]: If that card costs 1 or more, draw it.

cards.name: Lash
abilities: [keyword:Abomination]
Ambush: Choose a Hero from the HQ that doesn't have a printed [icon:attack] of 2 or more. Put it on the bottom of the HQ.
Fight: Gain a Hero from the HQ with no [icon:attack] icon that costs 4 or less.

cards.name: The Unspoken
abilities: [keyword:Double Abomination]
Ambush: Choose a Hero from the HQ that doesn't have a printed [icon:attack] of 2 or more. Put it on the bottom of the HQ.
Fight: KO one of your Heroes with no [icon:attack] icon.

cards.name: Plutonia
abilities: While the Mastermind has the [keyword:Thrones Favor], you must spend [icon:recruit] to fight Plutonia instead of [icon:attack].
Ambush: The Mastermind gains the [keyword:Thrones Favor].
Fight: You gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Starbolt
abilities: While the Mastermind has the [keyword:Thrones Favor], Starbolt gets +2[icon:attack].
Ambush: The Mastermind gains the [keyword:Thrones Favor].
Fight: You gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you may KO one of your Heroes.

cards.name: Mentor
abilities: Ambush: The Mastermind gains the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If they already have it, each player discards a card.
Fight: You gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, draw two cards.

cards.name: Gladiator
abilities: Ambush: The Mastermind gains the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If they already have it, each player gains a Wound.
Fight: You gain the [keyword:Thrones Favor]. If you already have it, you may KO a card from your discard pile.
Escape: Repeat the Ambush effect.
Setup: 11 Twists. Set aside two extra Heroes to get married. Prepare each Wedding Hero into a seperate 14-card stack, ordered by cost with the lowest cost on top.
Twist 1: Put one Wedding Hero Stack above the rightmost city space “at the altar.“ Gain its top card.
Twist 2: Put the other Wedding Hero Stack above the Mastermind space “at the door.“ Gain its top card.

Twist 3-7: Gain the top card of either Wedding Hero Stack. Then KO two cards from the top of each Wedding Hero Stack that has a Villain or Mastermind in the space immediately below it. Then the leftmost Hero Stack “walks down the aisle,“ moving one space to the right.
Twist 8-11: KO two cards from the top of each Wedding Hero Stack.
Evil Wins: When either Wedding Hero Stack is KO'd.
Setup: 11 Twists.
Twist 1-8: Stack this Twist next to the Scheme as a “Battlefront.“ This turn, you may pay 1[icon:recruit] per Battlefront to supply the war:

{"points":[[{"bold":"If you pay"},": You gain the ",{"keyword":70},". You may KO one of your cards."],[{"bold":"If you don't pay by the end of turn"},": Right after you draw a new hand, stack a card from the S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer Stack next to the Scheme as a “Victorious General.“ The Mastermind gains the ",{"keyword":70},". If they aleady have it, you gain a Wound."]]}
Twist 9-11: Same effect, but with two Victorious Generals.
Evil Wins: When there are 6 Victorious Generals.
Setup: 10 Twists. Each player puts a small object above the sewers to represent themself.

Special Rules: You can't fight Villains outside the city space where you are. (You can still recruit from all HQ spaces and fight the Mastermind.) During your turn, you can spend 1[icon:attack] any number of times to move yourself one space left or right.
Twist 1: Put this Tornado Scheme card above the Sewers.
Twist 2-5: Each player in the Tornado space gains a Wound. Then move this Tornado card and each Villain simultaneously one space to the left. (A Villain on the Bridge escapes.)
Twist 6-9: Same effect, but move them all to the right, if possible. (A Villain in the Sewers doesn't move.)
Twist 10: Evil Wins!
Setup: Add Twists equal to the number of players plus 3. Add an extra Henchman Group of 10 cards as “Xerogen Experiments.“
Special Rules: All Xerogen Experiments also have [keyword:Abomination].
Twist: Choose a Hero in the HQ that doesn't have a printed [icon:attack] of 2 or more. Put it on the bottom of the Hero Deck. Then play two cards from the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: When there are 3 Villains per player in the Escape Pile or the Villain Deck runs out.
